title: DeepSeek: Chinese AI Models Rattling U.S. Stocks According to Reports
description: Recent reports indicate that Chinese AI models associated with DeepSeek are causing fluctuations in U.S. and global stock markets, sparking discussions about the AI race.

sources.title: What to Know About the Chinese AI Models Rattling U.S. Stocks
Moon landing: Why this Chinese AI model rattled global sharemarkets
David Sacks warns U.S. could lose AI race after Chinese model's breakout

sections.heading: Market Impact
paragraphs: According to the WSJ, Chinese AI models are rattling U.S. stocks. Similarly, SMH.com.au reports that a Chinese AI model has rattled global sharemarkets.

sections.heading: AI Race Concerns
paragraphs: Axios reports that David Sacks has warned the U.S. could lose the AI race following the breakout of a Chinese model.

sections.heading: Search Interest
paragraphs: Google Trends data indicates a search volume lower bound of 100 for the term 'deepseek' in the GB region. Google Trends analyzes the popularity of search queries across specific regions and timeframes to identify trending topics.
